name: Wacky Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
2. Make three wells in the dry mixture.
3. In one well, add vanilla extract; in another, add vinegar.
4. In the third well, add vegetable oil.
5. Pour the cold water over the mixture and stir until combined.
6. Carefully pour the batter into an 8 x 8-inch pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for the cake to spring back when lightly pressed.
